Uttrakhand Board Class 10th and 12th Result 2020
GOVERNMENTUttrakhand Board of School Education UBSE will release its High School Class 10th and Intermediate Class 12th Exam Results 2020. Any candidates who have attended class 10 and Class 12 of UK board and are waiting for the result, will get their High School and Intermediate result Today 29 July 2020. You can see it from 11 AM on 29 July 2020, whose link will be available Some Useful Important Link Section.
—Check NotificationActive
Bihar Board Class 10th Matric Exam Result, Scrutiny and Compartment Result 2026
GOVERNMENTBihar School Examination Board (BSEB) Bihar Board release the results for the Class 10th Matriculation Annual Board Exam 2026. The answer key has already been released for enrolled candidates. Candidates can check it and verify their answers. Candidates with objections to any answers can submit them within the deadline and time specified by the board. After the objection process is complete, the BSEB will declare the final result. Candidates will be able to check their results/marks by entering their roll code and roll number on the official website. The official result 29 March 2026.
—Check NotificationActive
Bihar Board Class 12th Inter Exam Compartment Result 2026
GOVERNMENTBihar School Examination Board (BSEB) Bihar Board will soon release the results for the Class 12th Intermediate (Inter) Annual Board Exam 2026. The answer key has already been released for enrolled candidates. Candidates can check it and verify their answers. Candidates with objections to any answers can submit them within the deadline and time specified by the board. After the objection process is complete, the BSEB will declare the final result. Candidates will be able to check their results/marks by entering their roll code and roll number on the official website. The official result date will be announced soon.
—Check NotificationActive
Naukri Dhaba CISCE ICSE Board Xth and XIith Result 2026 Date
GOVERNMENTCouncil for the Indian School Certificate Examination (CISCE)
—Check NotificationActive

Maharashtra Board SSC Result 2020
GOVERNMENTMaharashtra HSSC Board will release its SSC High School Class 10 result Today i.e. on 29 July, 2020. Any candidates who have attended class 10 of Maharashtra (Pune, Nagpur, Aurangabad, Mumbai, Kolhapur, Amravati, Nashik, Latur, Kankan) board and are waiting for the result, will get their result Today 29 July 2020. You can see it from 01 PM on 29 July 2020, whose link will be available Some Useful Important Link Section.
—Check NotificationActive

GOVERNMENTWest Bengal Board of Secondary Education WBBSE will release its Higher Secondary HS Exam class 12 result Today i.e. on 17 July, 2020. Any candidates who have attended class 12 of WBBSE board and are waiting for the result, will get their Intermediate result Today 17 July 2020. You can see it from 4 Pm on 17 July 2020, whose link will be available Some Useful Important Link Section.
—Check NotificationActive

GOVERNMENTMadhya Pradesh Board MPBSE will release its high school class 10th and Intermediate Class 12th Supplementary result Today i.e. on 22 October, 2020. Any candidates who have attended class 10 of Madhya Pradesh board and are waiting for the result, will get their high school result Today 04 July 2020. You can see it from noon on 04 July 2020, whose link will be available Some Useful Important Link Section.

GOVERNMENTRajya Shiksha Kendra Madhya Pradesh MP Board will will release the results for the Class 5th and Class 8th Annual Exam 2026.
